hero.description: Create your child's book with a cartoon character in the best quality, and the AI will write a custom story for you - printed and shipped to your door! 🚀📚

workflow.description: From an idea to a printed book in your child’s hands — three easy steps that take just minutes.
workflow.step1_desc: Enter your child's name, age, and gender to customize the story.
workflow.step2_desc: Pick a theme and language, choose the book format, and preview your story for free before paying.
workflow.step3_desc: Complete your order — we print your magical hardcover book and ship it to your door within 5–8 days.
workflow.step4_desc: Enter your address and you will receive the high-quality printed book within days.
workflow.step5_desc: Your magic book arrives printed in professional quality with a hardcover right to your door.

about.hero_title_2: deserves a story of their heroism
about.hero_desc: Magic Fanoos is a leading platform combining AI and a love for children to create printed stories that stay with them forever.
about.founder_role: Software Engineer who believes technology exists to serve our dreams and turn them into reality 🤖📖
about.printing_experience: years of experience in the printing field
about.mission_desc: We aim to make reading a magical and personalized experience for every child. We believe a child who sees themselves as the hero in a story becomes a passionate reader for life.

values.1_desc: Every story we create is made with genuine love for children and belief in the value of reading.
values.2_desc: We use the best AI technologies to ensure high-quality stories.
values.3_desc: We pride ourselves on providing authentic content that reinforces our children's identity.
values.4_desc: Every book is completely different — uniquely customized for your child.
values.5_desc: We work at top speed to print your story and deliver it to your door within days.
values.6_desc: We support multiple languages to suit the diversity and culture of all families.

faqs.1_q: How do I build this book?
faqs.1_a: Through our easy interface, enter your child's details and choose the story theme, and the AI will do the rest in a flash!
faqs.2_q: How long does it take to make and deliver the book?
faqs.2_a: Story generation is instant. Once you approve the order, the book is printed and delivered to you within 5 to 8 business days.
faqs.3_q: Is the book suitable for all ages?
faqs.3_a: Yes! We precisely customize the story's language and style to suit the age group you choose.
faqs.4_q: Can I see the story before buying?
faqs.4_a: Absolutely! You can see 30% of the story and preview the cover for free before paying and confirming.
faqs.5_q: What materials are used to make the book?
faqs.5_a: We use high-quality paper, color printing, and premium binding to ensure a long-lasting book and a beautiful memory.
faqs.6_q: Do you offer special packages for schools or groups?
faqs.6_a: Absolutely! For schools, kindergartens, and group or bulk orders we offer special pricing and full customization. Get in touch and we'll tailor the perfect package for your group. 🏫

about.cta_desc: Start today and give your child an unforgettable experience.

stories_page.title: Magic
stories_page.description: Enjoy previewing our personalized stories where imagination meets reality to bring a smile to your child's face ✨
stories_page.preview_desc: You can view 30% of each story for free — the rest of the story is revealed after ordering your custom book
stories_page.preview_suffix: And the story continues in an exciting adventure full of surprises and lessons...
stories_page.want_custom_story: Do you want a story with your child's name?
stories_page.custom_story_desc: Create a fully personalized story for your child — their name is the hero, their theme is the tale
stories_page.modal_desc: This preview shows only 30% of the personalized story

samples.99_preview: Eyad always dreamed of the stars. On a quiet night, his bed suddenly transformed into an advanced spaceship full of shiny buttons!...
samples.1_preview: In a boundless desert, Mohammed set off with a courage no one had known before. His heart beat fast and his eyes shone with explorer's curiosity...
samples.2_preview: In a kingdom where roses fall from the sky, Princess Sarah was waiting for an adventure different from anything she had ever seen...
samples.3_preview: The spaceship rose while Ali held on with both hands, before him the infinite universe and his heart full of questions...
samples.4_preview: Reem dove underwater for the first time, and what her eyes saw she never imagined in her most beautiful dreams — a world sparkling...
samples.5_preview: Khaled discovered his superpower on an ordinary day, but with power came a responsibility he didn't expect...
samples.6_preview: Noura entered the secret forest that no one from the village had entered before, and was surprised by a voice calling her by name...
samples.7_preview: Youssef went back in time to the age of giants, where dinosaurs walked beside him as he searched for the way back...
samples.8_preview: In a secret lab, Layan turned on her little robot for the first time, to start a journey of programming and smart fun...
samples.9_preview: Hamza put on the chef's hat and began mixing magic ingredients, discovering that his dish gives those who taste it special abilities...
samples.10_preview: Jana played her old guitar, and suddenly the trees began to dance and the birds sang hope melodies with her...
samples.11_preview: Ahmed set off on a journey to the jungle, discovering that he is the only one who can understand animal language and help them...
samples.12_preview: Salma waved her magic wand, and everything around her turned into a world of candy and flying pink clouds...
samples.13_preview: Space - Part 1: Zaid landed on the moon's surface to find a hidden city inhabited by beings of light...
samples.14_preview: Space - Part 2: Zaid set off in his new ship toward the black hole to discover a portal to a parallel world...
samples.15_preview: School Adventure: Tala found a treasure map hidden inside her school bag, to start a search journey between classes...
samples.16_preview: First Day of School: It wasn't an ordinary day for Saif, as he discovered that his school flies above the clouds whenever the bell rings...
samples.17_preview: Deep Kingdom: Laura discovered an underwater city where houses are of pearls and gardens are of colored coral...
samples.18_preview: Flying Car: Omar turned his toy car into a real car that flies over traffic and takes him to wonderland...
samples.preview_helper: Suddenly, everything changed before their eyes and a new journey began, full of challenges requiring courage and intelligence. Will they be able to reach their goal?

policy.title: Policies and Terms
policy.privacy_content_1: At Magic Fanoos, we take your privacy very seriously. We are committed to protecting your personal data and not sharing it with any third party without your express consent.
policy.privacy_content_2: Data we collect: Name, email, shipping address, and your child's information (name and age) for the purpose of creating the story only.
policy.privacy_content_3: Data Security: All data is encrypted using HTTPS protocol and stored on secure servers.
policy.privacy_content_4: Children's Data: We are committed to special protection for children's data and only use it to create the personalized story.
policy.terms_content_1: Permitted Use: The platform is allowed to be used for personal and family purposes only.
policy.terms_content_2: Intellectual Property: Generated stories are owned by the user after full payment. We reserve the right to use anonymous data to improve the model.
policy.terms_content_3: Content: Using the platform to create offensive or inappropriate content for children is prohibited.
policy.terms_content_4: Pricing: Prices are in Israeli Shekels (₪) and include VAT. We reserve the right to change prices with prior notice.
policy.terms_content_5: Content Protection: All content, trademarks, and designs on this site are private property and protected under intellectual property laws.
policy.terms_content_6: Copyright: Copying, distributing, or reusing any part of the site content without obtaining prior written permission from us is prohibited.
policy.refund_content_1: We operate in accordance with the Israeli Consumer Protection Law of 1981 and the Consumer Protection Regulations (Cancellation of Transaction) of 2010.
policy.refund_content_2: Cancellation within 24 hours: You can cancel your order and get a full refund within the first 24 hours, provided that the production process has not yet started.
policy.refund_content_3: After production starts: The order cannot be cancelled or the amount refunded after printing has started, because the book is customized and printed specifically for you.
policy.refund_content_4: Order error: If you discover an error in the information (such as name or topic) within 24 hours, contact us immediately to make the correction.
policy.refund_content_5: Damage or error from our side: We guarantee to replace the book for free if it arrives damaged or if there was an error in the content from our side.
policy.shipping_content_1: Delivery: We currently ship to all supported areas. Self-pickup is also available from Jerusalem and Ramallah.
policy.shipping_content_2: Shipping time: 5-8 business days from the date of payment confirmation.
policy.shipping_content_3: Tracking: You will receive a message with your shipment tracking number as soon as the book is sent.
policy.payment_content_1: Payment methods: We accept payment via credit cards and fully encrypted and approved electronic payment gateways.
policy.payment_content_2: Security: We do not store your credit card data on our servers; all transactions are made through secure and approved payment service providers.
policy.data_deletion_content_1: Your rights: You have the right at any time to request the deletion of your account and all your data or your child's data from our servers.
policy.data_deletion_content_2: Method of request: You can send a data deletion request via email or through the 'Contact Us' page, and the request will be processed and the data permanently erased within a maximum of 14 business days.
policy.footer_question: Do you have questions about our policies?

zoo_adventure.title: [NAME]'s Adventure at the Zoo
zoo_adventure.moral: Nature is full of wonders, and every creature deserves love and respect.
zoo_adventure.conclusion: Great job, [NAME]! You are now a true friend of animals and their trusted protector. 🦁

questions.0: What animal did you like the most in the story?
questions.1: What did we learn about taking care of animals?
questions.2: If you were [NAME], what would you do at the zoo?

zoo_adventure.dedication: To [NAME], who fills our lives with joy and wonder every day — this magical story is just for you.

pages.1: On a bright sunny morning, [NAME] woke up early, jumping with joy. Today was the big trip to the zoo!
pages.3: When [NAME] reached the grand zoo gates, beautiful and exciting animal sounds echoed from inside.
pages.5: [NAME] saw a tall giraffe reaching its long neck towards the sky, peacefully munching on green leaves.
pages.7: Right next to the pond, [NAME] spotted a playful little monkey swinging between branches and waving with a big smile.
pages.9: Suddenly, a majestic lion let out a soft rumble, showing [NAME] its golden crown of fur.
pages.11: [NAME] watched colorful parrots flying above, singing beautiful melodies that filled the air with music.
pages.13: Near the water, a massive elephant was drinking happily, playfully spraying cool water with its long trunk.
pages.15: A slow, wise turtle walked past [NAME], carrying its strong shell and smiling warmly.
pages.17: [NAME] smiled at the pink flamingos standing gracefully on one leg in the shallow sparkling water.
pages.19: A mother kangaroo jumped by, carrying her sweet baby safely inside her cozy warm pouch.
pages.21: Under the shady trees, [NAME] saw giant pandas slowly chewing on fresh green bamboo shoots.
pages.23: As the sun began to set, the animal keeper walked over and presented [NAME] with a shiny 'Animal Friend' badge.
pages.25: [NAME] walked back home happily, holding the badge tight, excited to share all the animal adventures with family.

space.title: [NAME]'s Adventure in Space
space.tagline: A magical journey among the stars
space.moral: Courage opens the doors to new worlds, and the universe is full of beautiful mysteries.
space.conclusion: You are a true hero, [NAME], both on Earth and among the stars! 🚀

questions.0: How did [NAME] help the alien friend?
questions.1: What did [NAME] see from the spaceship window?
questions.2: If you traveled to space, what would you like to discover?

space.dedication: To [NAME], our brave hero whose dreams and ambitions reach the vast and starry universe.

pages.1: [NAME] always dreamed of the stars. One quiet night, the bed suddenly transformed into a high-tech spaceship filled with glowing buttons!
pages.3: With absolute excitement, [NAME] pressed the big red button, and the spaceship launched like lightning into the deep blue sky.
pages.5: Suddenly, everything in the room floated! In zero gravity, [NAME] drifted in the air like a fish swimming among the stars.
pages.7: [NAME] looked out the large window and saw planet Earth from afar, looking like a beautiful, tiny blue glass marble.
pages.9: The spaceship landed gently on a mysterious planet covered in soft purple sand, with glowing crystals all around.
pages.11: From behind a rock, a small and friendly alien with huge, shiny eyes appeared and began waving warmly at [NAME].
pages.13: The alien couldn't speak, but it drew a large glowing heart in the air, and [NAME] immediately knew it wanted to be a friend.
pages.15: The alien pointed sadly to a deep crater; the planet's power stone had fallen inside, taking away all its light and energy.
pages.17: Without hesitation, [NAME] tied a magical jump rope and bravely climbed down the dark crater to retrieve the stone.
pages.19: When [NAME] returned the stone to its pedestal, the entire planet suddenly lit up with spectacular neon colors and fireworks.
pages.21: To show its gratitude, the alien gifted [NAME] a tiny star that glows in the dark, and then it was time to say goodbye.
pages.23: The spaceship launched once again, carrying the little hero back to Earth through clouds that looked like sweet cotton candy.
pages.25: [NAME] woke up in bed and looked at their hand to find the little star still glowing! [NAME] smiled, knowing that courage reveals the universe's secrets.

school_hero.title: [NAME], The School Hero
school_hero.tagline: A magical adventure about kindness and helping others
school_hero.moral: Kindness is the ultimate superpower, and working together brings color back to our world.
school_hero.conclusion: You are a beacon of light, [NAME]! With your kindness and beautiful spirit, every day is an adventure. 🏫

questions.0: How did [NAME] bring the colors back to school?
questions.1: What did [NAME] do to save the little kitten?
questions.2: How can you also be a hero in your school?

school_hero.dedication: To [NAME], whose pure heart and brilliant smile make school and the world a much brighter place.

pages.1: [NAME] woke up with great energy, put on their favorite backpack, and set off towards school with a bright, happy smile.
pages.3: When [NAME] arrived, they were surprised to find that all the colors had vanished from the school walls! Everything looked sad in black and white.
pages.5: [NAME] did not give up, but decided to discover the secret and use their 'magic pencils' and kindness to bring the school back to life.
pages.7: In the science lab, [NAME] found their friend Sami sad because the volcano experiment failed. With a creative touch, [NAME] helped it erupt in a burst of colors!
pages.9: [NAME] entered the library and heard the books whispering sadly, asking for someone to organize them so their stories could come alive again.
pages.11: [NAME] called their classmates, and together they began organizing the books while singing a happy tune, bringing warmth back to the library.
pages.13: On the playground, [NAME] heard a soft meow; a small, frightened kitten was stuck high up on a tall branch of the school tree.
pages.15: Without hesitation, [NAME] stacked large, colorful blocks to build a safe ladder, gently catching the kitten and returning it to the ground.
pages.17: During recess, [NAME] saw a new student sitting all alone. [NAME] went over to share lunch, proving that kindness is the real superpower.
pages.19: In art class, with the teacher's permission, [NAME] began painting the students' dreams on the walls, and suddenly, vibrant colors returned to the entire school!
pages.21: At the end of the school day, everyone clapped warmly, and the principal presented [NAME] with the 'Little Hero' medal for their courage and kindness.
pages.23: [NAME] ran home excited, proudly telling their mother how school is not just lessons, but a place for adventure and helping others.
pages.25: [NAME] placed the shiny medal next to the bed and closed their eyes, excited and waiting for a brand new school adventure.

magic_book.title: The Journey of the Magic Book

pages.1: In a small room full of toys, [NAME] sat alone, flipping through an old book he had found in the cupboard. Suddenly, the pages began to glow with a strange golden light!
pages.2: "Oh my!" cried [NAME]. The light gently pulled his hand, and in the blink of an eye he was flying inside a swirling vortex of colors and floating words.
pages.3: [NAME] landed softly on a ground made of paper. The trees there were giant crayons, and the sky was painted in bright watercolors.
pages.4: A little rabbit wearing glasses and holding a paintbrush appeared and said: "Welcome, [NAME], to the World of Stories! We have been waiting for you for so long."
pages.5: The rabbit told [NAME] that the "Color of Happiness" had vanished from the book, and the whole world was turning black and white — and only the courage of a real child could bring it back.
pages.6: [NAME] began his journey and reached the "River of Blue Ink," but the bridge was broken. He thought cleverly, picked up a giant pencil, and drew a strong bridge to cross safely.
pages.7: In the dark forest, [NAME] met a wise owl who asked him: "What is the strongest thing in the world?" [NAME] answered: "Imagination!" The owl smiled and handed him a glowing key.
pages.8: [NAME] reached the Mountain of Tales. The path was rough, but he remembered his mother's words about patience and kept climbing until he reached the very top.
pages.9: At the top, [NAME] found an old, locked box. He used the glowing key, and when it opened, thousands of colorful butterflies flew out, coloring everything they touched.
pages.10: The trees turned green and the flowers turned red — the "Color of Happiness" returned to the world, all thanks to [NAME]'s courage.
pages.11: All the characters of the book gathered to celebrate. The rabbit and the owl danced with [NAME] and thanked him for saving their world from disappearing.
pages.12: The rabbit said: "It's time to go home, hero — but always remember, this book is your second home, and your imagination is the key." [NAME] waved goodbye as the golden vortex appeared to carry him back.
pages.13: [NAME] opened his eyes to find himself back in his room, the book in his lap. It no longer glowed, but his heart was full of excitement. He smiled and closed it, knowing his next adventure always lives between the pages of his magic book.

questions.0: What was the strongest thing that helped [NAME] on the journey?
questions.1: What did we learn about courage and patience from [NAME]'s story?
questions.2: If you were [NAME], what would you draw with the magic pencil?

magic_book.moral: Imagination is the strongest power in the world, and courage brings color and joy back to everything.
magic_book.conclusion: You are a real hero, [NAME] — and your imagination is the key to every adventure! ✨
magic_book.dedication: To [NAME], the child who holds a whole world of imagination in their hands.
